purpose: Track ten-year council-record coverage by year, source type, preservation status, extraction status and unresolved acquisition gaps.

sourceModel.knownConstraint: Repository GitHub Actions policy blocks external actions unless owned by mayhem82 and pinned to a full commit SHA. Coverage therefore uses manual/API source targeting until an allowed acquisition runner exists.

years.gap: Archive year page targeted; meeting-level agenda/minute records not yet enumerated.
years.nextAction: Expand archive year page into meeting records.

criticalGaps.title: Archive year pages not expanded
criticalGaps.impact: 2016-2021 cannot support disappearance analysis until meeting-level records are enumerated.

criticalGaps.title: Current index not fully enumerated
criticalGaps.impact: 2022-2026 coverage is incomplete even though the current index exists.

criticalGaps.title: Raw records not preserved
criticalGaps.impact: Source volatility risk remains; PDFs/pages could change or disappear before preservation.

criticalGaps.title: Text not extracted
criticalGaps.impact: Users still cannot inspect historical record contents inline. Registers only show source targets.
